sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11108" key="a)oidiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀοιδ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n11108.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">musical,</tr_> prob. coined by Sch.Heph.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0213.tlg001:p.130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.130</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
